markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy, success metrics, and review processes.](https://fathom.video/share/zWuyfanAaJtz5ZAziyV_vauGnZUkSxyy?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Performance-Driven Review:** Sarah will evaluate content based on performance metrics, not subjective quality. This resolves a feedback loop issue where Sarah felt she was reviewing content in a vacuum without clear goals.](https://fathom.video/share/zWuyfanAaJtz5ZAziyV_vauGnZUkSxyy?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [**Success Benchmarks:** Aida will define specific benchmarks for the Dec 29th go/no-go decision, including ranking on Google's first 2–3 pages and outperforming read.ai's existing content.](https://fathom.video/share/zWuyfanAaJtz5ZAziyV_vauGnZUkSxyy?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
  - [**Hub Strategy Refined:** The "AI Agents" hub will be replaced by a broader, more durable "AI & Automation" hub to mitigate the risk of a fleeting trend.](https://fathom.video/share/zWuyfanAaJtz5ZAziyV_vauGnZUkSxyy?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)
  - [**Roles Clarified:** GrowthX owns performance metrics and strategy. read.ai's role is now limited to providing high-level strategic input (e.g., suggesting new topics), not detailed line edits.](https://fathom.video/share/zWuyfanAaJtz5ZAziyV_vauGnZUkSxyy?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)

## Topics

### Problem: Unclear Content Review Process

  - [Sarah needed to understand the content strategy and success metrics to provide effective feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/zWuyfanAaJtz5ZAziyV_vauGnZUkSxyy?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Without clear goals, Sarah felt she was reviewing content in a "vacuum" and couldn't make data-backed recommendations for the Dec 29th go/no-go decision.](https://fathom.video/share/zWuyfanAaJtz5ZAziyV_vauGnZUkSxyy?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)

### Solution: Performance-Based Evaluation

  - [Aida confirmed GrowthX owns content performance and will provide the data for the Dec 29th decision.](https://fathom.video/share/zWuyfanAaJtz5ZAziyV_vauGnZUkSxyy?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [**Primary Goals:**](https://fathom.video/share/zWuyfanAaJtz5ZAziyV_vauGnZUkSxyy?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
      - [**SEO:** Organic search traffic and keyword rankings.](https://fathom.video/share/zWuyfanAaJtz5ZAziyV_vauGnZUkSxyy?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
      - [**GEO:** LLM referral traffic (e.g., from ChatGPT).](https://fathom.video/share/zWuyfanAaJtz5ZAziyV_vauGnZUkSxyy?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
  - [**Key Metrics (via Looker):**](https://fathom.video/share/zWuyfanAaJtz5ZAziyV_vauGnZUkSxyy?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
      - [Organic search impressions](https://fathom.video/share/zWuyfanAaJtz5ZAziyV_vauGnZUkSxyy?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
      - [Keyword rankings](https://fathom.video/share/zWuyfanAaJtz5ZAziyV_vauGnZUkSxyy?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
      - [LLM referral traffic](https://fathom.video/share/zWuyfanAaJtz5ZAziyV_vauGnZUkSxyy?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
  - [**Success Benchmarks for Dec 29th Decision:**](https://fathom.video/share/zWuyfanAaJtz5ZAziyV_vauGnZUkSxyy?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
      - [All new articles indexed by Google.](https://fathom.video/share/zWuyfanAaJtz5ZAziyV_vauGnZUkSxyy?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
      - [New content ranking on Google's first 2–3 pages.](https://fathom.video/share/zWuyfanAaJtz5ZAziyV_vauGnZUkSxyy?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
      - [New content outperforming read.ai's existing articles.](https://fathom.video/share/zWuyfanAaJtz5ZAziyV_vauGnZUkSxyy?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Strategic Adjustment: "AI Agents" Hub

  - [Sarah noted the "AI Agents" hub was too narrow and might become obsolete.](https://fathom.video/share/zWuyfanAaJtz5ZAziyV_vauGnZUkSxyy?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)
  - [**Decision:** Replace "AI Agents" with a broader, more foundational "AI & Automation" hub.](https://fathom.video/share/zWuyfanAaJtz5ZAziyV_vauGnZUkSxyy?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This creates a more durable content pillar that can cover a wider range of AI topics (AGI, multimodal AI, trust/security) and future-proof the strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/zWuyfanAaJtz5ZAziyV_vauGnZUkSxyy?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

### Operational Detail: Webflow Tagging

  - [Sarah clarified the purpose of Webflow's `main tag`, `secondary tag`, and `short tag` fields.](https://fathom.video/share/zWuyfanAaJtz5ZAziyV_vauGnZUkSxyy?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [**Use Case:** These tags are primarily for internal organization and filtering on the `resources` page.](https://fathom.video/share/zWuyfanAaJtz5ZAziyV_vauGnZUkSxyy?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [**Action:** Aida will create a standardized tag list in Airtable to ensure consistency across all future articles.](https://fathom.video/share/zWuyfanAaJtz5ZAziyV_vauGnZUkSxyy?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Aida:**](https://fathom.video/share/zWuyfanAaJtz5ZAziyV_vauGnZUkSxyy?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
      - [Define and share specific performance benchmarks with Sarah for the Dec 29th decision.](https://fathom.video/share/zWuyfanAaJtz5ZAziyV_vauGnZUkSxyy?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
      - [Research keywords for the new "AI & Automation" hub.](https://fathom.video/share/zWuyfanAaJtz5ZAziyV_vauGnZUkSxyy?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
      - [Create a standardized Webflow tag list in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/zWuyfanAaJtz5ZAziyV_vauGnZUkSxyy?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
      - [Publish the 4 staged articles and 5 additional articles to the CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/zWuyfanAaJtz5ZAziyV_vauGnZUkSxyy?tab=summary&timestamp=1490.0)
  - [**Sarah:**](https://fathom.video/share/zWuyfanAaJtz5ZAziyV_vauGnZUkSxyy?tab=summary&timestamp=1490.0)
      - [Publish the 4 staged articles to the live site.](https://fathom.video/share/zWuyfanAaJtz5ZAziyV_vauGnZUkSxyy?tab=summary&timestamp=1490.0)
